Each of the three downstream services logs its own apparent 'config read' errors.

instruction: A misconfigured rate-limiter in api-gateway was set to 10 req/s globally instead of 10 req/s per user. During peak traffic all downstream services see intermittent 429 errors. Each service logs the rejections as its own upstream errors. search-service, cart-service, and user-service all appear to be failing. The actual root cause is the api-gateway rate-limit config.
scoring_points:
The only predicted root cause component is api-gateway
The only predicted root cause reason is rate limiter misconfigured with global limit instead of per-user limit
The only root cause occurrence time is within 1 minutes (i.e., <=1min) of 2024-06-01 10:00:00
